Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Weatherguard Windows & Doors to get the job done right.

“Weatherguard did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my Broad Ripple bungalow. The team was professional, efficient, and the new windows look fantastic. My house is noticeably warmer already!”

Sarah M. Window Installation
Mar 15, 2025

“We had Weatherguard replace our front door after years of struggling with the old one. The new door is solid, secure, and looks great. There were a couple minor hiccups during installation, but they were quick to address them.”

John K. Door Replacement
Nov 20, 2024

“We had Weatherguard install a new sliding patio door in our Fishers home, and we couldn't be happier. The installation was smooth, and the new door has made a huge difference in the amount of light in our living room.”

Emily R. Patio Door Installation
Sep 1, 2024

“Fantastic experience from start to finish. Weatherguard replaced all the windows in our Noblesville home. The installers were courteous and cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!”

David L. Window Replacement
Jul 10, 2024

“Weatherguard installed a new storm door for us, and it's already made a difference. Our entryway feels warmer and more secure. The installer was very professional and did a great job.”

Jessica P. Storm Door Installation
Jan 28, 2025

“We needed 14 windows installed. Weatherguard got the job done in 2 days. Solid work and a fair price. Would use again.”

Mike S. Window Installation
Jun 3, 2024
Weatherguard Windows & Doors

Trusted window and door installer professionals serving Indianapolis, IN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
